ab: taskun a saikin aip mas inaak tu cina kudiip mapahainan.
en: I went out with my mother today.

ab: masanglav a dihanin mais hanian, nitu maklang, nitu mabahis, makazavkazav a iv’iv.
ch: 白天的天空很藍，天氣不冷也不熱，風很涼爽。
en: The sky is blue during the day, the weather is neither cold nor hot, and the wind is cool.

ab: isian a kaimin masu’ismuut maun mas paang, mais sanvaliun hai masmuav tu mananghat.
ch: 我們在草地上吃著麵包，陽光灑在身上，非常溫暖。
en: We ate bread on the grass, the sun was shining on us, and it was very warm.
In the afternoon, the sky turned red.

ab: masingav saikin mas cina tu: mavia tu sambaiv a dihaninan i?
ch: 我問媽媽，為甚麼天空是紅彩色的。
en: I asked my mother why the sky is red.

ch: 媽媽說，可能是颱風要來了。
en: Mom said, maybe the typhoon is coming.

ab: uka a luum masa sanavan, at sandimaldimal a bintuhan.
ch: 晚上天上沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: There were no clouds in the sky at night, and the stars came out.

ab: masa isian daan, masi’aupa saikin mas bintuhan masumsum.
ch: 在回家的路上，我跟星星許願。
en: On the way home, I made a wish with the stars,

ab: mahtuang a balivusa nitu minsuma, aupa na’asa’ang saikin muhna kudiip mapahainan.
ch: 希望颱風不要來，我還想再出去玩。
en: I hope the typhoon doesn't come, I still want to go out to play again.
